content: Free Apple Developer account (Personal Team): TestFlight NOT available - requires paid 9/year membership. Can sideload to own device: max 3 devices per platform, apps expire after 7 days. No App Store submission. No remote crash log collection (Xcode Organizer requires paid). Can view crash logs locally via Xcode > Devices and Simulators > View Device Logs, or on-device Settings > Privacy > Security > Analytics Data. Provisioning profiles short-lived, must re-provision regularly. Paid: 100 devices, 1-year cert validity, up to 10000 TestFlight testers.
